subject: [Pre-read] Aug SIP monthly meeting
deck_filename: SIP Monthly Meeting 20250825 + Chris biz update 20250828.pdf

content.answer:
Hi Ian,

Please find the attached doc for Aug SIP monthly meeting tomorrow.

   - Page 1-5: Slides prepared for monthly CB meeting with Chris/Terence on
   28 Aug
   - Page 6: SIP monthly meeting content

Thank you.
Cuiwei

content.question:
Thanks.



Slide 9

   - For WH cross selling, does it make sense for other markets?

Slide 11

   - Is there anything that we can do to make the lanes here structurally
   faster?

Slide 16

   - How do I differentiate the HC between FTEs and BPOs right now?

Am
   assuming all FTEs are frontlines?

Slide 17

   - Not sure why you want to have a team in MY to remote manage if all the
   FTEs/Agents are in PH
   - How do I reconcile the 11 FTEs here with the HC on Slide 16?
- How is Choice managing this right now?

Slide 20

   - Can we show the Cost per order over time for ID and PH agents?
- Where are Latam agents based now?

Are we sure we an reduce so many HC
   without impacting the quality of work?

Slide 21

   - Not sure what this means, I thought we were going to be more efficient
   and hence spend less on our CS agents (Slide 20)?

Slide 23

   - CB SCS average waiting time in queue is 12 mins?
Really so long?
- What is chatbot CSAT for CB SCS?

- Why does it take so long for us to rollout the new chatbot given that
   it has proven to be better?

Slide 24

   - Is AWT of 5 mins acceptable?

- Agent CR does not seem to be really improving



Slide 25

   - Agent CR dropped so much from Jun?

Slide 34

   - ADO seems to be growing much slower than Live SKUs?

Slide 37

   - Rejection rate still feels high for something that they do not have to
   do/does not affect their P&L



Slide 43

   - Direct selling ADO seems very small?

Slide 45

   - What is the target pitching pool contribution to their various country
   ADO?
In terms of %?
- What does mass pitching mean?

It should be 100% by now if its mass
   pitching?

Slide 47

   - Do not quite understand how the org chart and ownership here means
   exactly



Slide 48

   - Who is Local SIP SMT mean here?

- Maybe can use SG/MY as examples to show me exactly what we have in
   mind..



Slide 51

   - For existing sellers on direct, what does this mean for them?

How do
   we tell them about this and get them set up?
- For sellers who are not on direct, what does this mean for them?

How
   do we tell them about this and get them set up?

Slide 59

   - Any sense why the price competitiveness is so bad?

Slide 60

   - Why do we have to mark up so high?
What is LS and Video contribution to SIP orders right now?

How are we
thinking about using it to increase conversion?

*From:* Ian Ho <hoi@sea.com>
*Sent:* Sunday, 24 August 2025 10:10 pm
*To:* 'Cuiwei Sun' <cuiwei.sun@shopee.com>
*Cc:* 'Jianghong Liu' <jianghong.liu@shopee.com>; 'Shuning Wang' <

Hi Ian,

Slide 9 Huang Wan-Jung <wanjung.huangwj@shopee.com> Cuiwei Sun
<cuiwei.sun@shopee.com>

   -

   For WH cross selling, does it make sense for other markets?


Category

MTD ADO MYSG

Opportunity beyond MY>SG

Remarks

SCS

CB Choice/ Lovito

3,322

Low

   -

   CB Choice/Lovito LFF available in other markets
   -

   MYSG unique as no Choice/LVT LFF in SGWH (MYWH serves as SGWH)

Local SCS

2,472

Low

   -

   ID: Local SCS parked due to PR concerns
   -

   VN: Local SCS paused since Mar ’25 after low performance (~10 ADO after
   6 months). Key issue: SKU limitations imposed by legal

FBS

CB FBS

2,754

Medium

   -

   CB FBS LFF available in other markets
   -

   Opportunity: Leverage SIP’s faster lead time vs CNCB SLS in key lanes
   (IDMY, IDSG, MYTH, VNTH)
   -

   Next step: Assess SKU coverage potential based on 1) availability; 2)
   price competitiveness; 3) BWT; ETA: mid-Sep

Local FBS

61

High

   -

   Opportunity: ID/VN local FFF SKUs not supplied via local SIP
   -

   Scale (TBC): ID local FBS 50-70k ADO; VN local FBS 7-10k ADO
   -

   Challenge: system not ready due to multiple WHs in ID/VN; can start with
   1 WH
   -

   Next step: work with ID/VN local FBS team to assess SKU coverage
   potential, ETA: mid-Sep




Slide 11 Chiong Zhi Ann <zhiann.chiong@shopee.com>

   -

   Is there anything that we can do to make the lanes here structurally
   faster?
   -

      We are assessing/setting up below initiatives to improve LT
      structurally
      -

         First Mile: ID/MY FM lead time is longer than CNCB for ~1 days
         while LH/CC/LM LT on par. To explore 1) routing optimization
(explore more
         FM hub direct delivery to TWS); 2) express service with local
Logs team.
         -

         Transit Warehouse: To explore 24hrs operation and extend xray
         operation hrs to support more frequent outbound

Hi Wanlu, Emily,

Meeting doc and discussion notes for your reference. Thank you.

Hi Ian and all,

Please find the next steps from today's discussion. Thank you.

# Topic Action item PIC ETA
1 WH cross-selling Assess opportunity of local FBS cross-selling regional
scale up Jill Huang 18 Sep (SIP monthly meeting)
2 CS Proceed to confirm PH CS management / support team to be based in MY,
with 11 SIP dedicated HC Qiang Wei / Emily Lin 31 Aug
3 CS Update Chris on the change of reporting line and cost saving Qiang Wei 28
Aug (CB mgt meeting)
4 CS Align with reg BI on FTE/BPO cost booking to achieve highest combined
PC2 at Shopee level Chiong Zhi Ann 18 Sep (SIP monthly meeting)
5 CS Align with regional CS on definition of CS ops metrics (e.g.,
abandonment rate, AWT) Qiang Wei 31 Aug
6 Direct selling Propose incentive plan with local RMs to accelerate 1:1
pitching of target sellers Jill Huang 18 Sep (SIP monthly meeting)
7 Livestream Explore livestream options for SIP Zhang Yu 18 Sep (SIP
monthly meeting)
